description_long: This is a rectangular juice box with a vibrant, colorful design featuring the Hi-C brand and the flavor 'Ecto Cooler.' The front of the box displays a cartoon green character drinking from a straw, with an orange and a citrus slice illustration, and bold yellow and orange text. The box is primarily green with yellow panels and orange accents, and it includes a black plastic straw attached to the side. Nutritional information and product details are printed on the side panels, with clear branding and flavor indicators. The packaging appears to be made of a laminated paperboard or Tetra Pak material, typical for single-serve juice drinks. The overall appearance is playful and eye-catching, designed to appeal to children and nostalgic adults.
description: A colorful Hi-C Ecto Cooler juice box with a cartoon mascot, orange illustrations, and a black straw attached to the side. The packaging is green and yellow with bold branding and nutritional information.
description_view_0: Front and side of the juice box showing the Hi-C logo, Ecto Cooler flavor, cartoon mascot, and attached black straw.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the nutrition facts panel and the top of the box with the straw protruding.
description_view_2: Back and front of the box, showing the Hi-C logo, flavor, and the straw inserted into the top corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side panel with product details and the straw visible on top, as well as the Ecto Cooler label.
